lines: Tobit has fitted two mismatched jar handles together with cord.
"They hold if you lift both at once. Noa calls that something other than repair, though she still uses them."

choices.label: Ask what he wants Noa to do

questUpdate.log: Tobit wants Noa to take the school place and refuses to become the reason she stays.

choices.label: Ask whether he can keep the condenser running

lines: "Take the school and send drawings. Come home before Isaac pretends his cough is weather."
"If she stays for me, every broken pump will know it."

choices.label: Ask whether he can keep the condenser running
Let him keep working the handles

lines: "Not yet. I know the wash valves and tank scrapers, though Noa says I listen for answers before I know the questions."
"That means she is teaching me, even when she complains."

choices.label: Return to what Noa should do
